title: SolveSpace (open source 2D/3D CAD) working on Windows 2000 (2025)
description: SolveSpace just became "officially" available for the Web ( https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47586614 ), it is also officially supported on Windows (Vista-11), Linux and macOS. However with a little effort it also compiles for and runs on Windows 2000. Here it is: https://github.com/solvespace/solvespace/issues/1036#issueco... So it runs on all the majour platforms from the last 26 years (excluding MacOS 9). Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47607394 Points: 21 # Comments: 3

title: Show HN: Dull – Instagram Without Reels, YouTube Without Shorts (iOS)
description: I kept deleting and redownloading Instagram because I couldn't stop watching Reels but needed the app for DMs. Tried screen time limits, just overrode them. So I built this. Dull loads Instagram, YouTube, Facebook, and X and filters out short-form content with a mix of CSS and JS injection. MutationObserver handles anything that lazy-loads after the page renders, which is most of the annoying stuff since these platforms love to load content dynamically. The ongoing work is maintaining the filter
